archimate:Node.name: <Node>
archimate:Node.documentation: A computational or physical resource that hosts, manipulates, or interacts with other computational or physical resources. Active structure elements that perform technology behavior and execute, store, and process technology objects such as artifacts. For instance, nodes are used to model application platforms, defined by the TOGAF framework as: “a collection of technology components of hardware and software that provide the services used to support applications”
